title: MOZOOSON Water Gun Toy for Kids, Powerful Water Pistol with 600ML Moisture Capacity | 26ft - 33ft Long Range Squirt Gun, Blaster Toy for Kids and Adults
features: Fun Outdoor Water Toys: This water gun is made with durable thick plastic, non-toxic and eco-friendly. The cool look and bright color squirt guns will bring endless fun for children at pool party or outdoor summer festivity.
Kids Water Gun Without Leaking: Our squirt guns adopts dielectric welding to ensure strong and beautiful joints, no leak when use. Water squirt gun is a excellent toy for kids boys and girls.
Water Gun with Long Range: This water gun shoots range 26ft - 33ft. Fill up with 90% water to ensure sufficient air pressure inside, shooting in 45 degree, press pump to fire!

Water Gun Toy for 3 4 5 6 Years Old Kids: This water pistol gun is lightweight, can holds 600cc water, size is 14.5”x7.1”x1.9”, and easy to grip for little kids. Due to its fine design, it won’t hurt kids’ hands. Buy it now, let your kids enjoy hours of fun with this cute water gun in this summer! [Note: Don’t shoot eyes when use]
Toy water gun suitable for 3+ years.
description: Product Description Enjoy Summer Water Party Squirt gun is the best summer gift for your child. Whether in your home action yard, swimming pool, beach sand water fighting or water party, the water gun will create precious memories for kids and parents! Perfect Size for Kids Size:38x17x5cm/14.5”x7.1”x1.9” Capacity: 600ml Perfect for Summer Water Fighting, Family Fun, Swimming Pool and Outdoor Activities. Longer Shooting Range Pump-action soakage: pump to shoot after filling Clean Water. Shoot range 26ft - 33ft! The small hole on the cover can balance the pressure inside and outside.Therefore,some water may leak from the hole. No Squirt Gun No Summer 1.Open the lid of water injecting hole. 2.Adding enough water into water gun. (You can also infuse with ice cubes for a cool summer) 3.Tighten the water injection port to prevent leak. 4.The more pressure you build the longer you can shoot
